"'''Army'''" was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the [[Republic Army]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

==Biography==
Prior to the [[Battle of Serroco]], he was stationed near the [[Stereb cities]] at [[Camp Three (Serroco)|Camp Three]]. He praised the above-average quality of the food served at the ''[[Little Bivoli]]''.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 14|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 14]] {{1st}}
